message:
feat(web): enhance mobile UX with iOS fixes and haptic patterns

App.tsx - iOS scroll lock improvements:
- Fix background scroll when overlays are open on iOS Safari
- Detect existing fixed-body state to prevent double-locking
- Save and restore scroll position, body styles on cleanup
- Use position:fixed with negative top offset for iOS compatibility
- Add proper style property removal in cleanup function

main.tsx - Visual viewport tracking:
- Add installViewportVariables() for real-time viewport CSS variables
- Set --visual-viewport-height and --visual-viewport-width
- Track visualViewport API for accurate dimensions with iOS keyboard
- Listen to resize, orientationchange, and visualViewport events
- Use requestAnimationFrame for throttled updates
- Enables accurate layouts when iOS keyboard appears/disappears

BottomSheet.tsx:
- Minor animation and interaction refinements
- Improve spring physics parameters for smoother feel

PhagePickerSheet.tsx:
- Interaction polish and consistency improvements

haptics.ts - Premium haptic pattern library:
- Add hasUserActivation() check to hapticCustom to comply with
  browser autoplay/vibration policies
- Add contextual haptic sequences for complex interactions:
  - hapticNavigationComplete(): double-tap for navigation
  - hapticLongPressBuildup(progress): building tension for long-press
  - hapticSuccessCelebration(): multi-step positive feedback
  - hapticErrorRhythm(): emphatic negative feedback
  - hapticDragStart/Move/End(): movement feedback during drags
  - hapticSwipeComplete(): directional swipe confirmation
  - hapticMilestone(): major achievement feedback
  - hapticCountdown(): numbered sequence feedback
- All patterns respect prefers-reduced-motion and check activation

New components:
- LoadingProgress.tsx: Progress indicator for database loading
- PullToRefresh.tsx: Pull-to-refresh gesture for mobile

Styles:
- mobile-ux.css: Enhanced mobile-specific styling
- mobile-overrides.css: Minor refinement

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,131 @@
+/**
+ * LoadingProgress - Premium iOS-style top loading indicator
+ *
+ * A thin gradient progress bar with shimmer effect that appears
+ * at the top of the screen during loading operations.
+ *
+ * Features:
+ * - Gradient with shimmer animation
+ * - Indeterminate and determinate modes
+ * - Smooth entry/exit animations
+ * - Respects reduced motion
+ */
+
+import React from 'react';
+import { useSpring, animated } from '@react-spring/web';
+import { useReducedMotion } from '../../hooks/useReducedMotion';
+
+// =============================================================================
+// Types
+// =============================================================================
+
+interface LoadingProgressProps {
+  /** Whether the loading indicator is visible */
+  isLoading: boolean;
+  /** Progress value 0-100 for determinate mode (optional) */
+  progress?: number;
+  /** Custom class name */
+  className?: string;
+}
+
+// =============================================================================
+// Component
+// =============================================================================
+
+export function LoadingProgress({
+  isLoading,
+  progress,
+  className = '',
+}: LoadingProgressProps): React.ReactElement | null {
+  const reducedMotion = useReducedMotion();
+  const isDeterminate = typeof progress === 'number';
+
+  // Spring for visibility
+  const visibilitySpring = useSpring({
+    opacity: isLoading ? 1 : 0,
+    scaleY: isLoading ? 1 : 0,
+    config: { tension: 400, friction: 30 },
+    immediate: reducedMotion,
+  });
+
+  // Spring for progress (determinate mode)
+  const progressSpring = useSpring({
+    width: isDeterminate ? `${Math.min(100, Math.max(0, progress))}%` : '30%',
+    config: { tension: 300, friction: 30 },
+    immediate: reducedMotion,
+  });
+
+  return (
+    <animated.div
+      className={`loading-progress ${className}`}
+      style={{
+        position: 'fixed',
+        top: 0,
+        left: 0,
+        right: 0,
+        height: 3,
+        zIndex: 'var(--z-toast, 800)',
+        overflow: 'hidden',
+        transformOrigin: 'top',
+        opacity: visibilitySpring.opacity,
+        transform: visibilitySpring.scaleY.to(s => `scaleY(${s})`),
+        pointerEvents: 'none',
+      }}
+      role="progressbar"
+      aria-valuemin={0}
+      aria-valuemax={100}
+      aria-valuenow={isDeterminate ? progress : undefined}
+      aria-label="Loading"
+    >
+      {/* Background track */}
+      <div
+        style={{
+          position: 'absolute',
+          inset: 0,
+          background: 'var(--color-background-alt, #12121a)',
+        }}
+      />
+
+      {/* Progress bar */}
+      <animated.div
+        className={`loading-progress__bar ${isDeterminate ? 'loading-progress__bar--determinate' : 'loading-progress__bar--indeterminate'}`}
+        style={{
+          position: 'absolute',
+          top: 0,
+          left: 0,
+          height: '100%',
+          width: progressSpring.width,
+          background: `linear-gradient(
+            90deg,
+            var(--color-primary, #22d3ee) 0%,
+            var(--color-secondary, #c084fc) 50%,
+            var(--color-primary, #22d3ee) 100%
+          )`,
+          backgroundSize: '200% 100%',
+          borderRadius: '0 2px 2px 0',
+          boxShadow: '0 0 8px var(--color-glow, rgba(34, 211, 238, 0.5))',
+        }}
+      />
+
+      {/* Shimmer overlay for indeterminate mode */}
+      {!isDeterminate && (
+        <div
+          className="loading-progress__shimmer"
+          style={{
+            position: 'absolute',
+            inset: 0,
+            background: `linear-gradient(
+              90deg,
+              transparent 0%,
+              rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.3) 50%,
+              transparent 100%
+            )`,
+            animation: reducedMotion ? 'none' : 'loading-shimmer 1.5s ease-in-out infinite',
+          }}
+        />
+      )}
+    </animated.div>
+  );
+}
+
+export default LoadingProgress;
